ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cartridges" (
  "cartridge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cartridge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cartridge */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cartridge (e.g., rifle, pistol, shotgun) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the cartridge */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the cartridge */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the cartridge */,
  "bullet_weight" REAL /* Weight of the bullet in the cartridge */,
  "bullet_type" TEXT /* Type of bullet used in the cartridge */,
  "case_length" REAL /* Length of the cartridge case */,
  "rim_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the rim of the cartridge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cartridge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearms" (
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firearm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the firearm */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of firearm (e.g., rifle, pistol, shotgun) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the firearm */,
  "caliber" REAL /* Caliber of the firearm */,
  "barrel_length" REAL /* Length of the barrel of the firearm */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action used in the firearm */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Magazine capacity of the firearm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firearm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballistic_data" (
  "ballistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballistic data entry */,
  "cartridge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cartridge */,
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm used */,
  "fps" INTEGER /* Muzzle velocity in feet per second */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the cartridge in foot-pounds */,
  "power" REAL /* Power of the cartridge */,
  "recoil" REAL /* Recoil of the cartridge */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the ballistic data was recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the ballistic data was recorded */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at which the ballistic data was recorded */,
  "range" REAL /* Range at which the ballistic data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballistic_data_cartridge_id FOREIGN KEY ("cartridge_id") REFERENCES cartridges ("cartridge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballistic_data_firearm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firearm_id") REFERENCES firearms ("firearm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearm_cartridges" (
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm */,
  "cartridge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cartridge */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the compatibility of the firearm with the cartridge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firearm_id", "cartridge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "ballistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ballistic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the ballistic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ballistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("ballistic_id") REFERENCES ballistic_data ("ballistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cartridge_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cartridge type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cartridge type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cartridge type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the cartridge type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cartridge_type_relationships" (
  "cartridge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cartridge */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cartridge type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cartridge_id", "type_id")
)
